questionHtml: Identify the relationship between migration distance and plumage colouration.
markschemeHtml:
1. the longer the migration, the lighter the colour / vice versa;
  2. too much variation so it is not possible to see a relationship;

meta.title: Identify the relationship between migration distance and plumage colouration.
